prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The measurement record for E-301 Conductor selection & sizing shows the as-left reading inside the posted limit. The gauge or scale is readable, the setup is stable, and the same value is entered on the inspection form. Source anchors for review: NEC 310, Table 310.16.
title: T1 E-301 Compliant Measurement & estimation
